overview: This plant is identified as a Zamia Fern (Bowenia spectabilis), a type of cycad. It is native to tropical rainforests in Queensland, Australia. Although it resembles a fern, it is actually a non-flowering plant with subterranean stems and compound leaves. iNaturalist +2 3 sites Zamia Fern (Bowenia spectabilis) · iNaturalist Zamia Fern (Bowenia spectabilis) · iNaturalist.
